title: Mango cup + 'YAMMY BLUBERY SHAKE!'
prompt: Tight close-up at the front counter of @wawa-interior, blurred convenience-store aisle behind. @Sara already on the LEFT holding a clear plastic mango cup with diced golden mango pieces, a small wooden fork sticking out the top. @Eva already on the RIGHT holding a tall purple plastic blueberry shake cup with whipped cream piled on top and a wide blue straw, both hands wrapped around it like a trophy. The @wawa-snacks props are clearly visible in their hands. Eva (chest puffed huge, lifting the shake cup high above her head): "YAMMY BLUBERY SHAKE!" Sara (gentle correction, half-laughing): "It's YUM-my BLUE-berry, silly." Eva (lowering the cup to take a HUGE slurp through the straw, cheeks puffing): "Blubery." Sara (rolls eyes affectionately, then pokes her mango cup with the fork).
